# opnsense_quagga_ospf6_network (Resource)

Manages an OSPFv3 network on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `area` (String) OSPFv3 area.
- `ip_address` (String) Network address.
- `netmask` (Number) Netmask bits.

### Optional

- `area_range` (String) Optional area range summarization.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this network is enabled.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
